comment: Each preset injects into the Ideogram 4 caption style_description. medium decides photo (photograph) vs art_style (everything else). color_palette is image-level (<=16 uppercase #RRGGBB).

styles.description: High-energy clickable thumbnail: bold flat vector, heavy outlines, saturated colors.
styles.lighting: bright even key light with a strong rim light separating the subject from the background
styles.art_style: bold flat vector graphic design, heavy clean outlines, high-contrast saturated color blocks, strong drop shadows

styles.description: Movie-still look: shallow depth of field, dramatic teal-and-orange grade.
styles.lighting: dramatic directional lighting with deep shadows and a strong rim light
styles.photo: shot on a full-frame camera, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field, sharp focus, teal and orange color grade

styles.description: Clean Swiss-grid poster with confident whitespace and crisp typography.
styles.aesthetics: modern editorial, minimal, clean Swiss grid, confident spacing, subtle paper texture
styles.lighting: flat even print-design lighting with no shadows
styles.art_style: flat vector graphic design, clean Swiss international typographic grid, generous whitespace, geometric composition

styles.description: Mid-century screen-print travel poster, flat shapes, nostalgic palette.
styles.aesthetics: nostalgic mid-century, warm vintage, screen-print texture
styles.lighting: flat stylized lighting with simple gradient skies
styles.art_style: flat vector mid-century travel poster, screen-print look with limited ink colors, simplified geometric shapes

styles.description: Studio product photo: softbox lighting, clean reflections, premium feel.
styles.lighting: soft studio softbox lighting with gentle gradient reflections and a clean falloff
styles.photo: studio product photography, macro detail, sharp focus, seamless background, realistic reflections

styles.description: Clean modern flat illustration, friendly and vibrant.
styles.lighting: bright flat illustration lighting with soft ambient occlusion
styles.art_style: clean modern flat illustration, smooth vector shapes, friendly characters, vibrant saturated palette

styles.description: Futuristic neon-lit cyberpunk look with glow and dark background.
styles.lighting: vivid neon glow lighting, magenta and cyan rim light, dark atmospheric background with haze
styles.art_style: detailed digital painting, cyberpunk concept-art style, glowing neon signage, reflective wet surfaces

styles.description: Aggressive gritty gaming cover with grunge textures and bold contrast.
styles.lighting: harsh dramatic lighting with strong contrast and glowing accents
styles.art_style: gritty grunge graphic design, distressed textures, bold angular shapes, intense high-contrast composition

styles.description: Gentle pastel lifestyle aesthetic with soft diffused light.
styles.aesthetics: soft, calm, pastel, cozy lifestyle, airy
styles.lighting: soft diffused natural window light, gentle shadows, bright airy exposure
styles.photo: lifestyle photography, 35mm lens, soft focus background, pastel color grade

styles.description: Sleek modern tech look with smooth gradient mesh and glassmorphism.
styles.aesthetics: sleek, modern, tech, futuristic, premium SaaS
styles.lighting: smooth gradient ambient lighting with soft glow highlights
styles.art_style: modern graphic design with smooth gradient mesh backgrounds, glassmorphism panels, clean geometric accents
